openSource.name: Laravel Async Audit Logger
openSource.description: This package provides an asynchronous audit logging system using Redis as a buffer and a Daemon Worker for bulk database insertion. It is designed to handle high-traffic applications where traditional synchronous logging would cause performance bottlenecks.

openSource.name: Laravel Advanced CRUD Generator
openSource.description: Designed a modular Laravel package utilizing the Service-Repository Pattern to automate backend scaffolding via custom Artisan commands, implementing Metaprogramming and Reflection API for dynamic database schema validation. The solution features an abstract filtering and sorting engine optimized to handle complex nested relationship searches without N+1 query issues, while ensuring data integrity through atomic bulk operations secured by database transactions.

projects.name: SiakadCloud Product
projects.description: Developed a comprehensive cloud-based academic information system for universities, integrating modules for student management, course scheduling, and faculty administration. Implemented a robust backend architecture to support high concurrency and ensure data integrity across multiple campuses.

projects.name: E-Sign V2 Platform
projects.description: Engineered the core backend infrastructure for the centralized E-Sign platform, specifically designing a high-throughput logging system to trace complex vendor integrations and ensure strict audit compliance. Simultaneously developed an asynchronous event-driven notification service utilizing RabbitMQ to decouple email and in-system alerts from main processes.

projects.name: WhatsApp Blasting Tool
projects.description: Development of an internal application for broadcasting WhatsApp messages. The tool is designed with features for comprehensive customer data management and flexible message content management, with the ability to schedule and execute message delivery.

projects.name: Internal QA Tools
projects.description: Development of a specialized internal tool for the Quality Assurance team. A centralized platform that streamlines and manages various aspects of the QA workflow including test cases, issue tracking, software releases, and test runs.

projects.description: Led the implementation of an HRM module fully integrated with Odoo ERP to automate and optimize employee monitoring. Enabled real-time synchronization of attendance, leave, and payroll data.
